elements.name: row
elements.doc: Flex container; children flow along the horizontal main axis.

elements.name: column
elements.doc: Flex container; children flow along the vertical main axis.

elements.name: stack
elements.doc: Overlay container; children stack on top of each other.

elements.name: panel
elements.doc: Overlay container panel; children stack on top of each other.

elements.name: card
elements.doc: Overlay container card; children stack on top of each other.

elements.name: scroll
elements.doc: Scroll view; wrap multiple children in a single column inside it.

elements.name: list
elements.doc: Vertical stack of items; supports virtualized and virtual-item-extent.

elements.name: grid
elements.doc: Cell grid container.

elements.name: split
elements.doc: Two-pane horizontal splitter with a draggable divider between exactly two element children. value binds the model-owned first-pane fraction (0 lays out at 0.5), on-resize dispatches the applied fraction (echo it back into value), min-width on the panes bounds the drag; gap sets the divider band thickness. Nest splits for more panes.

elements.name: tree
elements.doc: Disclosure-tree container (vertical flow): descendant rows carrying role="treeitem" form one roving keyboard focus set — Up/Down walk visible rows (selection follows focus via each row's on-press), Left collapses or moves to the parent row, Right expands or moves to the first child row, Home/End jump to the edges. Expandable rows bind expanded and on-toggle; the model owns both states.

elements.name: text
elements.doc: Text leaf; content supports {} interpolation. Line policy via wrap: wrap="true" word-wraps, wrap="false" clips to one honest line. size takes the typography rungs heading|display for section headings and hero stats.

elements.name: badge
elements.doc: Text leaf badge; content supports {} interpolation.

elements.name: button
elements.doc: Text-bearing control; the label is the text content. Dispatch with on-press. icon draws a vector icon inline before the label (icon-only when the content is empty; give it a label) — one hit target, one enabled/disabled tint.

elements.name: checkbox
elements.doc: Value control; bind checked, dispatch with on-toggle.

elements.name: radio
elements.doc: Value control; bind checked or selected, dispatch with on-toggle.

elements.name: toggle
elements.doc: Text-bearing toggle control; the label is the text content.

elements.name: slider
elements.doc: Value control; bind value, dispatch with on-change.

elements.name: progress
elements.doc: Value control; bind value.

elements.name: text-field
elements.doc: Text entry; placeholder and text binding, edits via on-input, enter via on-submit.

elements.name: search-field
elements.doc: Text entry styled for search; edits via on-input.

elements.name: textarea
elements.doc: Multi-line text entry; edits via on-input, enter inserts a newline, submit via primary+enter with on-submit.

elements.name: list-item
elements.doc: Text-bearing item control; the label is the text content.

elements.name: menu-item
elements.doc: Text-bearing menu control; the label is the text content.

elements.name: status-bar
elements.doc: Status bar text leaf: content only, no children.

elements.name: separator
elements.doc: Separator line: a horizontal rule in a column, a thin vertical divider in a row.

elements.name: spacer
elements.doc: Flexible space; give it a grow.

elements.name: breadcrumb
elements.doc: Row container for a breadcrumb trail; children flow horizontally.

elements.name: button-group
elements.doc: Row container grouping buttons; children flow horizontally.

elements.name: pagination
elements.doc: Row container for pagination controls; children flow horizontally.

elements.name: radio-group
elements.doc: Row container grouping radio controls; children flow horizontally.

elements.name: tabs
elements.doc: Row container for a tab strip; children (buttons with selected) flow horizontally.

elements.name: toggle-group
elements.doc: Row container grouping toggle-buttons; children flow horizontally.

elements.name: table
elements.doc: Vertical table container; children are table-row elements.

elements.name: table-row
elements.doc: Horizontal table row; only allowed inside a table, children are table-cells.

elements.name: table-cell
elements.doc: Table cell text leaf; only allowed inside a table-row, dispatch with on-press.

elements.name: dropdown-menu
elements.doc: Vertical menu surface; children are menu-item elements. anchor="below|above" floats it against its parent (put it beside its trigger in a stack): late z-pass above the whole tree, window-clipped, auto-flipping at the edges. Pair with on-dismiss so Escape/click-outside close model-side.

elements.name: accordion
elements.doc: Surface with a header (text attribute); children show when selected, dispatch with on-toggle.

elements.name: alert
elements.doc: Alert surface; title via the text attribute, children stack inside.

elements.name: bubble
elements.doc: Bubble surface (chat message); children stack inside. Hugs its message up to 80% of the thread's width (ghost is exempt; an explicit width wins). A <reactions> child docks the reaction pill on its bottom edge; text does nothing here (that channel belongs to the pill — use label for an accessible name).

elements.name: dialog
elements.doc: Modal dialog surface rendered in place; title via text, wrap in an if to show conditionally.

elements.name: drawer
elements.doc: Drawer surface rendered in place; title via text, wrap in an if to show conditionally.

elements.name: sheet
elements.doc: Sheet surface rendered in place; title via text, wrap in an if to show conditionally.

elements.name: resizable
elements.doc: Resizable panel with an engine-managed drag handle; width sets the initial width.

elements.name: avatar
elements.doc: Avatar leaf; the text content renders as initials, image takes one {binding} to a runtime-registered ImageId (0 keeps the initials).

elements.name: select
elements.doc: Select trigger only (no options attribute): content is the current value, placeholder while empty, on-press opens. Compose the options as an ANCHORED dropdown-menu of menu-items under an if, beside the trigger in a stack (anchor="below" + on-dismiss; model-owned open state).

elements.name: switch
elements.doc: Switch control; label is the text content, bind checked, dispatch with on-toggle.

elements.name: toggle-button
elements.doc: Pressed-state toggle button; label is the text content, dispatch with on-toggle.

elements.name: tooltip
elements.doc: Tooltip text leaf; content supports {} interpolation.

elements.name: input
elements.doc: Single-line text entry; text and placeholder bindings, edits via on-input, enter via on-submit.

elements.name: combobox
elements.doc: Text entry with menu affordance (no options attribute); edits via on-input, open via on-press — compose the options like select's anchored dropdown-menu pattern (filter the for-each source from the model as the user types).

elements.name: skeleton
elements.doc: Loading placeholder block; size with width and height.

elements.name: spinner
elements.doc: Indeterminate progress spinner leaf.

elements.name: icon
elements.doc: Vector icon leaf: name selects a curated built-in stroke icon (comptime-validated), an app-registered app:<name> (canvas.icons.registerAppIcons; native check verifies the name against the model contract), or one {binding} resolving to such a name. Tint via foreground, size with width/height or size.

elements.name: markdown
elements.doc: Renders a markdown string (GFM subset, pipe tables included) as widgets; source is one {binding}, links dispatch on-link (bare URLs autolink), <details> blocks toggle via on-details + details-expanded, #123 refs linkify via issue-link-base.

elements.name: stepper
elements.doc: Stage stepper: step children joined by connectors; active names the current step index (earlier steps render completed, later ones pending).

elements.name: step
elements.doc: One stepper stage; only allowed inside a stepper, the label is the text content (supports {} interpolation), state derives from the stepper's active index.

elements.name: timeline
elements.doc: Ledger/timeline list container; children are timeline-item elements (for/if work). Takes gap, grow, key, global-key, label.

elements.name: timeline-item
elements.doc: One timeline/ledger item: title (required), description, meta, indicator + variant color the leading badge, connector="false" ends the rail; on-press makes the whole item pressable with a trailing chevron.

elements.name: chart
elements.doc: Data chart: series children bind model f32 iterables and draw as token-colored line/area/bar plots (lowered through Ui.chart — same downsampling, theming, and semantics summary). Takes y-min, y-max, grid-lines, baseline, x-labels, y-labels, hover-details, stroke-width, width, height, grow, padding, key, global-key, label. Display-only (presses fall through); hover-details makes it a hover target; the series set is static.

elements.name: series
elements.doc: One chart series (chart children only): values is one {binding} naming a []const f32 iterable (the same sources for each accepts; NaN samples draw nothing), kind is line, area, or bar, color a token name, label the semantics name.

elements.name: context-menu
elements.doc: Right-click menu on its DIRECT parent (a pressable element): menu-item children (on-press required, disabled optional) and bare separators, with if/else/for around them. Presents through the platform's native menu; hosts without one mount the same items as an anchored surface automatically. Attribute-less; drive in tests with widget-context-menu.

elements.name: input-group
elements.doc: Composer-grade grouped input: ONE bordered field wrapping exactly one textarea (first) plus an optional input-group-actions row inside the same border. The group wears the focus ring for its focused descendant and the textarea's own chrome dissolves, so the whole group reads as one field. Takes label, width, height, min-width, grow, key, global-key.

elements.name: input-group-actions
elements.doc: The input-group's accessory row (only inside input-group, after its textarea): leading/trailing controls on one bottom row inside the group's border — put a <spacer grow="1"/> between the leading controls and the trailing send. Children are ordinary elements (if/else/for work). Takes gap, key, global-key.

elements.name: span
elements.doc: Inline styled run inside a <text> paragraph: mixed-weight, mono, italic, scaled, underlined, and token-colored runs word-wrap as ONE paragraph and announce as one text run. Takes weight (regular|medium|bold), mono, italic, scale (a positive multiplier on the paragraph's base size), underline, foreground; content is one run of text ({bindings} work). Whitespace between runs collapses to a single space; runs written with no whitespace between them abut. Spans do not nest; layout, events, and identity stay on the enclosing text.

elements.name: reactions
elements.doc: The bubble's reaction pill (only inside bubble, at most one): a small muted capsule straddling the bubble's bottom edge, holding one run of text ({bindings} work). Takes text-alignment naming the dock — start, center, or end (the default trailing dock). Consumes no layout space (it overlaps like the reference); give the next turn breathing room with the thread's own spacing. Draws on the page plane, so a primary bubble's knockout ink never applies.

structure.name: for
structure.doc: Structure tag: repeats its element children over each (elements, use, if/else, nested for); requires each and as, key names an item field. A directly following else renders when the iterable is empty.

structure.name: if
structure.doc: Structure tag: renders children when test={binding} or {a == b} is true.

structure.name: else
structure.doc: Structure tag: must directly follow an if (renders when the test is false) or a for (renders when the iterable is empty).

structure.name: template
structure.doc: Top-level template definition (before the view root): name, optional args (name or name=default; defaults are literals), exactly one element child, at most one <slot/>.

structure.name: use
structure.doc: Expands a template in place: template names an earlier definition, other attributes must match its args exactly (defaulted args may be omitted). Children are slot content: built in the consumer's scope and inserted at the template's <slot/>.

structure.name: import
structure.doc: Top of the file, before templates: <import src="components/cards.native"/> splices a component file's templates (transitively) before this file's own. Paths resolve relative to this file, under the markup root.

structure.name: slot
structure.doc: Template bodies only, at most one: marks where use-site children are inserted. Attribute-less leaf; a use with no children renders it empty.

attributes.name: text
attributes.doc: Text value for text-bearing elements; a literal or one {binding}.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.doc: Hint text shown while a text entry is empty.

attributes.name: value
attributes.doc: Value for slider/progress/text entry; a literal or one {binding}.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.doc: Checked state for checkbox/toggle; true/false or a {binding}.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.doc: Selected state; often a {a == b} equality.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.doc: Disables the control; true/false or a {binding}.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.doc: Visual variant: default|primary|secondary|outline|ghost|destructive.

attributes.name: size
attributes.doc: Control size: default|sm|lg|icon. On text, also the typography rungs heading|display (themable token steps above title - a section heading, a hero stat); numeric sizes are not accepted - retheme the typography tokens instead.

attributes.name: width
attributes.doc: Definite width (plain number): the element is exactly this wide; content neither shrinks nor overflows it. On resizable it is the initial width.

attributes.name: height
attributes.doc: Definite height (plain number): the element is exactly this tall; content neither shrinks nor overflows it.

attributes.name: grow
attributes.doc: Flex grow factor; give spacer one.

attributes.name: gap
attributes.doc: Spacing between children (plain number). Rejected on stacking containers (stack, panel, card, the modal surfaces) — they layer children; put a column (or row) inside for flow.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.doc: Uniform padding (plain number).

attributes.name: main
attributes.doc: Main-axis alignment: start|center|end|space_between.

attributes.name: cross
attributes.doc: Cross-axis alignment: stretch|start|center|end.

attributes.name: wrap
attributes.doc: text only: true word-wraps the content at the width the element receives (reserving wrapped height in columns); false and unset are honest single-line - one line whose overflow follows the overflow attribute (trailing ellipsis by default), so a width-constrained title never paints over the row below.

attributes.name: overflow
attributes.doc: text only: what a single line does with content that does not fit - ellipsis (the default) elides behind a trailing …; clip hard-cuts at the frame for fixed-format content (a duration column) where a partial glyph beats losing the format. Wrapped paragraphs (wrap="true") ignore it.

attributes.name: text-alignment
attributes.doc: Horizontal alignment of text content: start|center|end. Consumed by text (plain and wrapped), status-bar, and surface titles; controls that own their label placement (button, badge) ignore it. On a bubble's reactions child it names the pill's dock (end is the default trailing dock).

attributes.name: columns
attributes.doc: grid only: fixed column count (plain number or one {binding}); omit for the derived near-square grid.

attributes.name: virtualized
attributes.doc: Enable list virtualization (true/false).

attributes.name: virtual-item-extent
attributes.doc: Fixed item extent for virtualized lists (plain number).

attributes.name: key
attributes.doc: Sibling-scoped identity key; on for, names an item field.

attributes.name: global-key
attributes.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

attributes.name: role
attributes.doc: Accessibility role (listitem, treeitem, button, ...). treeitem also makes the row part of its tree's roving keyboard focus set.

attributes.name: min-width
attributes.doc: Width floor (plain number) without width's definite max: the element may grow past it but never shrink below. On split panes it bounds the divider drag.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.doc: Tree rows (role="treeitem"): disclosure state (true/false or a {binding}). Omit on leaves; expanded rows collapse on Left, collapsed ones expand on Right, both through on-toggle - the model owns the state.

attributes.name: label
attributes.doc: Accessible name; when set it REPLACES the element's text as the announced name - screen readers and automation snapshots see the label, never the text it shadows.

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.doc: Focusable controls only: moves keyboard focus to the element when it mounts or when the value turns on (edge-triggered - holding it true never re-steals focus). The TEA way to focus an editor on create.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.doc: button, toggle-button, list-item, menu-item: vector icon drawn inline (buttons/toggle-buttons before the label, list/menu items as a leading slot): a built-in name (comptime-validated against canvas.icons.known_icon_names, e.g. save, plus, refresh-cw), an app-registered app:<name>, or one {binding} resolving to such a name. Icon-only buttons when the content is empty — add a label. One hit target, one enabled/disabled tint.

attributes.name: icon-placement
attributes.doc: Icon slot side on label-bearing buttons/toggle-buttons: leading (default) draws the icon before the label, trailing after it — the next-page chevron. Icon-only buttons center the glyph regardless.

attributes.name: window-drag
attributes.doc: Marks the element as a window-drag surface (the hidden-titlebar pattern): pressing its background - or plain text/icons inside - moves the window; double-click zooms per the OS convention. Buttons and other press-claiming children inside stay clickable. macOS-only; elsewhere the press is dead space.

attributes.name: overscroll
attributes.doc: scroll only: edge behavior of the region. none pins scrolling at the content edges (the shipped default via the ScrollPhysics.overscroll token), rubber_band lets this region bounce past them, default follows the token. Honored by the engine's scroll physics and the native OS scroller alike.

attributes.name: resize-duration
attributes.doc: split only: layout-tween duration in milliseconds (a plain number or one {binding}). Nonzero makes the bound value a TARGET - a rebuild that moves it lays both panes out at the target ONCE, then the runtime slides the rendered boundary there one presented frame at a time under the panes' clips (content never re-wraps mid-flight), dispatching ONE on-resize echo at settle with the applied fraction. 0 (and absent) snaps, today's behavior. A divider DRAG keeps live per-step reflow and echoes. Reduced-motion appearances snap automatically - apps declare nothing extra.

attributes.name: resize-easing
attributes.doc: split only, beside a nonzero resize-duration: easing curve of the layout tween - linear, standard (the default), emphasized, or spring. Easing without a duration is a teaching error (it would be silently inert).

attributes.name: resize-origin
attributes.doc: split only, beside a nonzero resize-duration: the fraction a freshly MOUNTED split's pane boundary slides in from toward its declared value (children keep the value's layout; the pane clips reveal them) - a pane expanding out of an unmounted collapsed state slides in instead of popping. An origin without a duration is a teaching error (it would be silently inert).

attributes.name: background
attributes.doc: Background color token (literal ColorTokens field name: background, surface, surface_subtle, ...).

attributes.name: foreground
attributes.doc: Foreground/text color token (literal ColorTokens field name, e.g. text, text_muted, success, warning, info).

attributes.name: accent
attributes.doc: Accent color token (literal ColorTokens field name, e.g. accent, destructive, success, warning, info).

attributes.name: accent-foreground
attributes.doc: Accent foreground color token (literal ColorTokens field name, e.g. accent_text).

attributes.name: border-color
attributes.doc: Border color token (literal ColorTokens field name, e.g. border).

attributes.name: focus-ring
attributes.doc: Focus ring color token (literal ColorTokens field name, e.g. focus_ring).

attributes.name: radius
attributes.doc: Corner radius token (literal RadiusTokens field name: sm, md, lg, xl).

events.name: on-press
events.doc: Dispatch a Msg on press: tag or tag:{payload}. Legal on any element — a bound press handler makes it pressable, and presses on plain text/icons inside it fall through to it (dragging still selects text).

events.name: on-toggle
events.doc: Dispatch a Msg on toggle: tag or tag:{payload}. Hit-target elements only (checkbox, toggle, toggle-button, switch, accordion, ...).

events.name: on-change
events.doc: Dispatch a Msg on change: tag or tag:{payload}. Hit-target elements only (slider, ...).

events.name: on-submit
events.doc: Dispatch a Msg on submit: tag or tag:{payload}. Enter in a text field, primary+enter in a textarea; on a list-item, plain Enter dispatches it as the row's primary action while Space keeps the row's select (on-press).

events.name: on-input
events.doc: Names a Msg variant with canvas.TextInputEvent payload; delivers each text edit.

events.name: on-scroll
events.doc: scroll element only: names a Msg variant with canvas.ScrollState payload; delivers the post-scroll offset/viewport/content extents after wheel, kinetic, keyboard, and accessibility scrolls.

events.name: on-dismiss
events.doc: Dismissible surfaces only (dialog, drawer, sheet, dropdown-menu): Msg dispatched when Escape or a click outside dismisses the surface, so the MODEL owns the close (clear the open flag in update). The engine hides the surface immediately as an optimistic echo; the source tree wins on the next rebuild.

events.name: on-hold
events.doc: Press-and-hold Msg: a pointer held ~350 ms dispatches it and the release then presses nothing; a quick click dispatches on-press as usual. A right/ctrl-click with no context menu on the route dispatches it immediately. Like on-press, binding it makes any element pressable.

events.name: on-resize
events.doc: split element only: names a Msg variant with f32 payload; delivers the applied first-pane fraction after every divider drag, keyboard adjustment, and assistive increment/decrement. Echo it back into value - the delivered fraction never fights the reconcile.

events.name: on-reach-end
events.doc: scroll element only: Msg (tag or tag:{payload}) dispatched when a user scroll comes within one viewport of the content end - the infinite-scroll fetch signal. Fires once per approach with hysteresis: it re-arms only after the offset retreats past 1.5 viewports, which appending a batch causes on its own by growing the extent.

markdown.name: source
markdown.doc: markdown: one {binding} producing the markdown text (a []const u8 field or fn; arena fns work). Required.

markdown.name: on-link
markdown.doc: markdown: bare Msg tag dispatched on link press; its payload is the URL ([]const u8 variant).

markdown.name: on-details
markdown.doc: markdown: bare Msg tag dispatched on a <details> summary press; its payload is the block index (usize variant).

markdown.name: details-expanded
markdown.doc: markdown: {binding} naming a []const bool iterable of expanded flags, in details-block document order.

markdown.name: issue-link-base
markdown.doc: markdown: literal URL prefix or one {binding}; '#123' refs become links to base ++ number (ghissue:// or https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/).

stepper.name: active
stepper.doc: stepper: the active step index (a number or one {binding}); earlier steps render completed, later ones pending. Required.

stepper.name: global-key
stepper.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

stepper.name: label
stepper.doc: Accessible name; when set it REPLACES the element's text as the announced name - screen readers and automation snapshots see the label, never the text it shadows.

stepper.name: autofocus
stepper.doc: Focusable controls only: moves keyboard focus to the element when it mounts or when the value turns on (edge-triggered - holding it true never re-steals focus). The TEA way to focus an editor on create.

timeline.name: global-key
timeline.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

timeline.name: label
timeline.doc: Accessible name; when set it REPLACES the element's text as the announced name - screen readers and automation snapshots see the label, never the text it shadows.

timeline.name: autofocus
timeline.doc: Focusable controls only: moves keyboard focus to the element when it mounts or when the value turns on (edge-triggered - holding it true never re-steals focus). The TEA way to focus an editor on create.

timeline-item.name: title
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: bold first line (a literal or one {binding}). Required.

timeline-item.name: description
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: wrapped muted preview under the title (a literal or one {binding}).

timeline-item.name: meta
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: muted trailing meta line, e.g. "claude · sonnet · 1m 12s" (a literal or one {binding}).

timeline-item.name: indicator
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: leading badge text ("✓", a number); empty renders a small dot.

timeline-item.name: variant
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: indicator color variant (default|primary|secondary|outline|ghost|destructive) - map run outcomes here.

timeline-item.name: connector
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: false ends the connector rail (set on the last item).

timeline-item.name: on-press
timeline-item.doc: timeline-item: Msg dispatched from anywhere on the item (tag or tag:{payload}); adds a trailing chevron.

timeline-item.name: key
timeline-item.doc: Sibling-scoped identity key; on for, names an item field.

timeline-item.name: global-key
timeline-item.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

avatar.name: image
avatar.doc: avatar: one {binding} to a u64 ImageId the app registered at runtime (fx.registerImageBytes); 0 renders the initials fallback.

chart.name: y-min
chart.doc: chart: explicit y-domain floor (a number or one {binding}); omit to derive from the data. Bars always force 0 into a derived domain.

chart.name: y-max
chart.doc: chart: explicit y-domain ceiling (a number or one {binding}); omit to derive from the data.

chart.name: grid-lines
chart.doc: chart: horizontal token-hairline gridlines at even divisions (whole number; 0/omitted = none — gridlines are opt-in).

chart.name: baseline
chart.doc: chart: draw a hairline at the baseline (zero clamped into the domain); true/false or a {binding}.

chart.name: x-labels
chart.doc: chart: one {binding} naming a model iterable of strings — one category label per sample, oldest first (label i names sample i). Drawn muted below the plot, deterministically thinned to fit; dropped when a series downsamples (bucketed indices no longer name the labeled samples).

chart.name: y-labels
chart.doc: chart: numeric y tick labels (true/false or a {binding}). Ticks ride a nice-step lattice (1/2/5 x 10^k, exact at their precision); with grid-lines set, gridlines share the lattice so grid and labels never disagree.

chart.name: hover-details
chart.doc: chart: pointer-hover point details (true/false or a {binding}) — hovering snaps to the nearest sample and floats a card with its label and every series' value. Interaction-only chrome (static renders never show it); presses still fall through.

chart.name: stroke-width
chart.doc: chart: line stroke width override (plain number; default 1.5).

chart.name: width
chart.doc: Definite width (plain number); 0/omitted keeps the intrinsic sparkline-sized default (160x48).

chart.name: height
chart.doc: Definite height (plain number); 0/omitted keeps the intrinsic sparkline-sized default (160x48).

chart.name: global-key
chart.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

chart.name: label
chart.doc: Accessible name; omitted charts get a generated series summary ("chart: line cpu 60 pts last 0.42") so automation reads the data without pixels.

series.name: kind
series.doc: series: line, area, or bar (literal; default line). Area is a line filled to the baseline; band envelopes stay with the Zig builder (ui.chart).

series.name: values
series.doc: series: one {binding} naming a []const f32 iterable (a model field, pub decl, or fn - the same sources for each accepts). Required. Pad a short history's leading gap with NaN samples - they draw nothing.

series.name: color
series.doc: series: literal color token name (a canvas ColorTokens field, e.g. accent, info, success, text_muted); default accent. Series retheme with the palette.

series.name: label
series.doc: series: name for the chart's semantics summary ("cpu", "stars"); the kind tag stands in when empty.

input-group.name: label
input-group.doc: Accessible name; the group announces as ONE named field (role group) while the entry and accessory controls stay individually reachable.

input-group.name: width
input-group.doc: Definite group width (plain number); 0/omitted sizes from the entry plus the actions row.

input-group.name: height
input-group.doc: Definite group height (plain number); the entry grow-stretches to absorb it.

input-group.name: min-width
input-group.doc: Width floor (plain number) without width's definite max.

input-group.name: global-key
input-group.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

input-group-actions.name: gap
input-group-actions.doc: input-group-actions: spacing between the accessory controls (plain number; default 6).

input-group-actions.name: global-key
input-group-actions.doc: Parent-independent identity: ids survive reparenting between containers.

span.name: weight
span.doc: span: the run's weight — regular, medium (the semibold rung), or bold (a literal or one {binding} producing one of those names).

span.name: mono
span.doc: span: renders the run in the mono face (true/false or a {binding}) — inline code, file names, keyboard keys. Mono ignores weight and italic (one mono face ships).

span.name: italic
span.doc: span: slants the run (true/false or a {binding}).

span.name: scale
span.doc: span: the run's size as a POSITIVE multiplier on the paragraph's base size — the text element's size rung included, so scale="1.5" inside a heading paragraph draws at heading x 1.5 (a literal number or one {binding} producing one). The paragraph reserves ONE line height sized by its largest scale, and every run shares that line's baseline. Inline headings, hero stats, fine print.

span.name: underline
span.doc: span: underlines the run (true/false or a {binding}) — purely visual, like every span channel; it is not a link (link spans stay Zig-builder territory).

span.name: foreground
span.doc: span: the run's color as a literal ColorTokens field name (e.g. text_muted, success, warning) — unset inherits the paragraph's foreground.

reactions.name: text-alignment
reactions.doc: reactions: where the pill docks along the bubble's bottom edge — start, center, or end (the default trailing dock). A literal name: the dock is a static design choice, like anchor placement.

dropdown-menu.name: anchor
dropdown-menu.doc: dropdown-menu: floats the surface against its PARENT's frame instead of the flow (literal below or above; either side auto-flips at the window edges). Late z-pass above the whole tree, window-clipped — never cropped by a scroll pane, never reflows siblings. Put the dropdown beside its trigger inside a stack.

dropdown-menu.name: anchor-alignment
dropdown-menu.doc: dropdown-menu (with anchor): horizontal alignment against the anchor - start, end, or stretch (stretch also widens the surface to at least the anchor's width, the select-menu look).

dropdown-menu.name: anchor-offset
dropdown-menu.doc: dropdown-menu (with anchor): literal gap in points between the anchor edge and the surface (default 4).

template.name: name
template.doc: template: the definition's name, referenced by use. icon: the vector icon to draw (a comptime-validated built-in name, app:<name>, or one {binding}).

template.name: args
template.doc: template: space-separated arg names use sites must pass (slice bindings iterate, scalars bind as values); name=default declares a literal default the use site may omit.

template.name: template
template.doc: use: names an earlier top-level template to expand in place.

template.name: src
template.doc: import: a .native component file (templates only), relative to the importing file, under the markup root.

for.name: each
for.doc: for: Model field, pub decl, or model fn producing the slice to iterate.

for.name: as
for.doc: for: name of the loop variable bindings use.

for.name: key
for.doc: for: item field that keys identity across reorders.

if.name: test
if.doc: if: one {expression} - a binding, a comparison (count > 0, a == b), or boolean logic (and/or/not).
